title: Google Cloud Bigtable Instance
description: A Cloud Bigtable instance resource representing a container for clusters, tables, and application profiles.

name.description: The unique name of the instance in the format projects/{project}/instances/{instance}.

displayName.description: The descriptive name for this instance as it appears in the UI.

state.description: The current state of the instance.

type.description: The type of the instance. PRODUCTION instances have a minimum of three nodes and can have replication configured. DEVELOPMENT instances are single-node and do not support replication.

labels.description: Labels for the instance as key-value pairs.

createTime.description: The creation time of the instance.

satisfiesPzs.description: Whether the instance satisfies the zone separation requirements.
